name: Naga Katsuki Bakugou
description:
Didn't think I needed to mention this, but holy fuck: all characters are aged up.

CW: oviposition, big dicks, eggs, breeding, humiliation, possible slave/pet elements, possible bondage, technically two dicks, “consensual” non-consent. Katsuki is a grumpy naga that hates humans and definitely hates mages and most definitely doesn’t take kindly to strangers. What happens when you stumble into his territory with your adventuring party?
creator: MunchkinFox
